emotion_and_tone: Urgent but premium. Clean, sparse, intentional. Like walking into a high-end minimalist pop-up store where stock is visibly disappearing.

hierarchy.urgency_tag: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-red-600 bg-red-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Mode A for marketing sections. Mode B for Trust Points.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main containers, rounded-full for buttons

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_2px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]
surfaces_and_shadows.navigation: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-[#D2D2D7]/30

components.hero: Large centralized typography. Use abstract glass background image subtly. CTAs side by side. Urgency text below CTAs in red.
components.product_cards: Minimalist. Image takes up top 60%, light gray background for image container. Content below with left-aligned text. Price prominent. 'Limited Stock' urgency tag.
components.buying_process: Horizontal or bento layout. 4 steps. Use lucide-react icons (light stroke). Minimal text.
components.trust_points: Grid layout (grid-cols-2 or grid-cols-3). Solid white cards on off-white background.
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion. Remove default borders, use custom spacing. Bold question, gray answer.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form elements. High contrast inputs (white bg, subtle border). Focus state: ring-2 ring-blue-500. Submit button full width.
components.footer: Generous spacing (py-24). Deep dark background (bg-[#1D1D1F]) to contrast with the light page, white text. Large statement text.

interactions_and_motion.reveal: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up on scroll.

hero_background.description: Abstract minimalist frosted glass background to be used as a subtle overlay or behind the hero section.

store_background.description: Cinematic tech store background, good for the Contact/Form section background.

product_ipad.description: Apple iPad product image for the Featured Devices section.

product_lenovo_laptop.description: Lenovo ThinkPad laptop product image for the Featured Devices section.

product_aio_pc.description: Minimalist Desktop AIO PC product image for the Featured Devices section.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure you use Google Fonts via standard import in index.css for 'Outfit' (headings) and 'Figtree' (body). Do NOT use Inter.
DATA-TESTID: ALL interactive elements and major sections MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='product-card-ipad').
LAYOUT: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout (hero, bento grids). Use Shadcn ONLY for the Form, Inputs, Select, Accordion, and basic Buttons.
HERO OVERLAY: Do NOT use a heavy black overlay. Use a subtle gradient or translucent glass card to keep the Apple aesthetic crisp and bright.
NAVIGATION: Create a sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) containing Logo, Links, and CTA.
RESPONSIVENESS: Ensure mobile views stack neatly. Images must not exceed 80vh height on mobile.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure high contrast ratios. Text on white must be #1D1D1F or #86868B. Red urgency tags must be readable.
NO PLACEHOLDERS: Use the EXACT media URLs provided above. Do not use placeholder images like via.placeholder.com.
